message:
refactor(wasm): extract MiniLM model to separate module

Extract MiniLM all-MiniLM-L6-v2 text encoder to minilm_model.zig.
This completes Phase 4 of the wasm.zig modularization:

- minilm_model.zig: 384-dim encoder, 6 layers, WordPiece tokenizer
- wasm.zig reduced from 3,668 to 1,617 lines (-2,051 lines)
- WASM binary size unchanged at 188KB

Phase 4 extractions complete:
- gguf_utils.zig: Shared GGUF parsing and transformer math
- clip_model.zig: CLIP ViT-B/32 text encoder
- minilm_model.zig: MiniLM all-MiniLM-L6-v2 encoder
